scripts.build:extension:chrome:dev: npm run build && mkdir -p extension/dist/assets && cp dist/index.html extension/dist/index.html && cp -R dist/assets/. extension/dist/assets/
scripts.build:extension:firefox:dev: npm run build && mkdir -p extension/firefox/dist/assets && cp dist/index.html extension/firefox/dist/index.html && cp -R dist/assets/. extension/firefox/dist/assets/
